title: Battle of Deneba

{{Quote|The Krath have unleashed the dark side with great malevolence.|Arca Jeth|<ref name="DLotS3" />}}
The '''battle''' on Deneba took place in the year [[3997 BBY]] during the [[Krath Holy Crusade]], and was one of the earliest known [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] offensives to occur during that conflict. From his main base in the city of [[Cinnagar/Legends|Cinnagar]], the Krath leader [[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal Keto]] remotely launched a large army of [[Krath war droid/Legends|war droids]] against the [[Conclave at Deneba|Jedi assembly]], which had [[Jedi Convocation|gathered]] on the planet [[Deneba/Legends|Deneba]] in order to discuss the rising threat of the Krath in the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]]. The Krath war [[Droid/Legends|droids]] initially caught the convocation unprepared, but the Jedi were able to mount an organized defense and stop the war droids' advance. During the battle, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Arca Jeth]], who was famous for his role in ending the [[Great Droid Revolution]], [[Beast Wars]], and [[Freedon Nadd Uprising]], was slain while protecting his onetime student, the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]].

==History==
===Prelude===
{{Main|Conclave at Deneba}}
{{Quote|The Krath conspiracy must be torn out by its roots before it can spread out to other systems.|Ulic Qel-Droma|<ref name="DLotS3" />}}
Following the [[Battle of Koros Major]], which witnessed the defeat of a joint [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]-[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] task force that had been sent to restore order, the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] called for a large [[Conclave at Deneba|convocation]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Deneba/Legends|Deneba]], to take place at [[Mount Meru (Deneba)|Mount Meru]].

[[File:JfleetDeneba.jpg|thumb|left|185px|Thousands of Jedi descend onto Deneba.]]
Hearing the [[Force call|call]] sent out through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], thousands of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knights]] reported to Deneba and assembled together under the guidance of Master [[Odan-Urr/Legends|Odan-Urr]]. As the conclave began, Odan-Urr allowed [[Nomi Sunrider]] and [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] to address the assembly; they did so, informing the gathered Jedi of their experiences with the Sith during the [[Freedon Nadd Uprising]], and the more recent battle in the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]].<ref name="DLotS3" />

Explaining the threat that the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] and their [[Sith sorcery/Legends|Sith magic]] posed to the continued security of the Jedi and Republic, Qel-Droma proposed a plan to the gathered Jedi assembly through which he could deal with the Krath, and eventually destroy the threat of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. Among those gathered on Deneba were many who believed that only by marshaling the full military might of the Jedi and the Republic and launching a full counteroffensive could the Krath be defeated. Qel-Droma, however, believed that through infiltrating the enemy's ranks he could destroy them from within and thus preserve thousands of lives that would otherwise be lost to a protracted military campaign. Firmly believing that his plan was the right course of action, Qel-Droma argued his strategy to those who were gathered.<ref name="DLotS3" />

Many Jedi, however, including Qel-Droma's former master, Arca Jeth, Knights [[Shoaneb Culu]], [[Dace Diath]], and Master [[Shayoto]], spoke of the dangers of attempting to destroy the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] from within. To further support this side of the argument, Master Jeth warned Qel-Droma that he could not destroy the dark side entirely, but merely contain it as Master [[Thon]] had done with the dark forces on the planet of [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]]. Furthering this line of thinking, Master Jeth continued by stating that even though the Jedi could never hope to destroy the dark side, through their combined efforts they could create a wall of light to contain any dark presence they encountered.<ref name="DLotS3" />

===The battle===
{{Quote|A lightstaff will take care of these guys!|[[Qrrrl Toq]], during the fight|<ref name="DLotS3" />}}
[[File:Swdl3.jpg|thumb|200px|The death of Arca Jeth.]]
While the conclave was getting under way, an unidentified [[Tetan Corsair]] had managed to insert itself amongst the combined mass of Jedi [[Starship/Legends|ships]] gathered in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around Deneba. At a prearranged time, decided upon by [[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal Keto]], who was safely ensconced in the Empress Teta [[Star system/Legends|system]], the Corsair launched its complement of [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]], each of which contained a number of deadly [[Krath war droid/Legends|Krath war droids]]. Unknown to the assembled Jedi, the Krath war droids had begun their mass descent through the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] of the planet. The Krath hoped to catch the Jedi unawares in the hopes of delivering a devastating blow against their numbers, thus causing even more chaos and turmoil to engulf the Jedi Order and diverting their attention from further Krath offensives.<ref name="DLotS3" />

The war droids rained down upon the Jedi assembly, which was gathered on Mount Meru. While the Jedi responded to the unforeseen Krath attack, their [[Service droid/Legends|servant droids]], which had been sabotaged by Krath [[Spy/Legends|spies]], were activated and ordered to attack the Jedi. With two separate groups of droids now attacking them on two fronts, the fight soon turned into an unorganized brawl. The initial stages of the battle witnessed the deaths of many unsuspecting Jedi. Nevertheless, the majority of Jedi were able to put up a barely-organized defense, managing to halt the Krath attack and eventually push it back. It was during this time that Master Jeth demonstrated his mastery of the [[Force power/Legends|Force talent]] of [[Ionize|Droid Disable]], which he had perfected during the [[Great Droid Revolution]] of [[4015 BBY]].<ref name="DLotS3" />

Despite the efforts of the Jedi defenders, however, many more of their number were killed in the fighting; included among the casualties was Arca Jeth himself, who was fatally wounded by a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] shot in the back while at the same time saving the life of Ulic Qel-Droma. Qel-Droma, wracked with immense grief, held Master Jeth in his arms as the old [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] passed away and became one with the Force. Following the battle, Qel-Droma stayed at the location of Master Jeth's death for many hours. As a result of the battle's outcome, Qel-Droma chose to go ahead with his proposed plan of infiltrating the Krath, vowing to bring them down from within no matter what the cost to himself or those around him.<ref name="DLotS3" />

===Aftermath===
{{Quote|Nomi…I will do what I said I would do. I will destroy the Krath from within.|Ulic Qel-Droma|<ref name="DLotS3" />}}
Following the battle on Mount Meru, Qel-Droma prepared for his mission into Krath territory and departed the Jedi assembly intent on infiltrating the Krath.<ref name="DLotS4" /> His mission was thought to have failed, however, after several months passed with no word of his status making its way out of enemy territory. In response to this development, Nomi Sunrider organized a [[Mission to Empress Teta|search and rescue mission]] in hopes of extracting Qel-Droma from the Empress Teta system.<ref name="DLotS5" />

==Behind the scenes==
The battle on Deneba first appeared in the issue [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|''Dark Lords of the Sith 3: Descent to the Dark Side'']] of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] series of comics. The battle was conceived and written by authors [[Tom Veitch]] and [[Kevin J. Anderson]], and was drawn by artist [[Chris Gossett]]. Veitch and Anderson chose this battle as the point from which their lead character, Ulic Qel-Droma, would begin his fall to the dark side of the Force.<ref name="DLotS3" />

The battle would eventually be featured in the [[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]], which witnessed the death and destruction of the battle take on a whole new personality through the voice acting of [[John Cygan]] (Ulic Qel-Droma), [[Glynnis Talken Campbell|Glynnis Talken]] (Nomi Sunrider), and [[Jim Ward (voice actor)|Jim Ward]] (Arca Jeth).
